response.overview: After the assassination of a powerful crime syndicate heir, a coastal township is thrown into chaos. Inspector Anand Kumar is assigned to investigate the sudden rise in violence, only to uncover a trail leading to a mysterious vigilante known as the Sweet Rogue Killer. As the ruthless Forelli syndicate returns to reclaim control, hidden truths from the past begin to surface. Caught between law and justice, Anand must navigate a dangerous path as the vigilante steps out of the shadows, leading to a confrontation that will determine the fate of the town.
response.title: The Killer's Game: Marai Mugam
